examples: They abandoned the car in the snow.
She abandoned her dream of becoming an actress.
The building was abandoned years ago.
items.memoryTip: a-BAN-don: BAN (cấm) + don (làm) → cấm không làm nữa → từ bỏ

examples: She has the ability to learn quickly.
His ability to solve problems is impressive.
The test measures your reading ability.
items.memoryTip: A-bi-li-ty: 'Ả Bi' có 'lý' → có khả năng lý luận giỏi

examples: She achieved her goal of graduating with honors.
We can achieve anything with hard work.
items.memoryTip: A-chieve: 'ơ chìa' khóa → dùng chìa khóa mở cửa thành công → đạt được

examples: I accept your terms and conditions.
items.memoryTip: Ac-cept: 'ắc xép' → xếp vào chấp nhận

examples: Please take into account all the facts.
She gave a detailed account of what happened.
items.memoryTip: Ac-count: 'ơ cao' → tài khoản cao lên nhờ tiết kiệm

examples: Being tall is an advantage in basketball.
We have an advantage over our competitors.
She took advantage of the opportunity.
items.memoryTip: Ad-van-tage: 'ớt vặn' tay → có lợi thế vì biết 'vặn' tình huống

examples: Can you give me some advice?
My advice is to study every day.
items.memoryTip: Ad-vice: 'ớt vai' → ai cho lời khuyên thì vỗ vai

examples: I can't afford a new car.
Can you afford to take a vacation?
items.memoryTip: Af-ford: 'ơ Ford' → không đủ tiền mua xe Ford!

examples: We reached an agreement after hours of discussion.
items.memoryTip: A-gree-ment: 'agree' (đồng ý) + ment → sự đồng ý

examples: The company announced a new product.
They will announce the results tomorrow.
items.memoryTip: An-nounce: 'ơ nâu' → thông báo bằng giấy nâu dán tường

examples: We need a new approach to this problem.
The train is approaching the station.
He approached me with a smile.
items.memoryTip: Ap-proach: 'áp' sát gần → tiếp cận

examples: That behavior is not appropriate here.
We need to find an appropriate solution.
items.memoryTip: Ap-pro-pri-ate: 'áp' dụng 'pro' (chuyên nghiệp) → phù hợp

examples: He made an attempt to climb the mountain.
Don't attempt to fix it yourself.
This is my third attempt at the exam.
items.memoryTip: At-tempt: 'ớt' cay quá nhưng vẫn 'cố gắng' ăn

examples: She attracted a lot of attention.
items.memoryTip: At-ten-tion: 'ớt TEN' → chú ý 10 điều quan trọng

examples: The doctor is not available today.
items.memoryTip: A-vail-able: 'ơ về' là có → có sẵn, rảnh rỗi

examples: His behavior in class is unacceptable.
items.memoryTip: Be-have: 'bị hại' vì hành vi xấu

examples: What are the benefits of this job?
items.memoryTip: Bene-fit: 'bên' nào cũng 'fit' (khỏe) → lợi ích cho mọi bên

examples: We need to stay within budget.
The project has a limited budget.
She manages the family budget carefully.
items.memoryTip: Bud-get: 'bớt' chi tiêu → quản lý ngân sách

examples: Learning a new language is a challenge.
items.memoryTip: Chal-lenge: 'chạy' lên dốc → đó là thử thách

examples: The main character in the movie is a doctor.
She plays an interesting character in the play.
items.memoryTip: Cha-rac-ter: 'cha rất tốt' → nhân vật cha tốt tính

examples: How do you communicate with your team?
items.memoryTip: Com-muni-cate: 'cộm' đồng → cộng đồng cần giao tiếp

examples: We are part of a strong community.
The community center offers free classes.
She is active in the local community.
items.memoryTip: Com-muni-ty: 'cộm' + unity (đoàn kết) → cộng đồng đoàn kết

examples: You can't compare apples and oranges.
How does this compare to your old job?
items.memoryTip: Com-pare: 'cặp' → đặt cặp bên nhau để so sánh
Com-plain: nói 'plain' (thẳng) ra → phàn nàn thẳng thắn

examples: He became more confident over time.
items.memoryTip: Con-fi-dent: 'con' tin (confidence) → đứa con tự tin

examples: Have you considered all the options?
I consider him a good friend.
items.memoryTip: Con-sider: 'cân' + side (bên) → cân nhắc nhiều bên

examples: Everyone should contribute to the team.
items.memoryTip: Con-tri-bute: 'con' tri (trí) thức đóng góp cho đời

examples: I tried to convince her to stay.
He convinced me to buy the car.
It's hard to convince people to change.
items.memoryTip: Con-vince: 'con' win (thắng) → thắng bằng lời → thuyết phục

examples: We need to create new opportunities.
items.memoryTip: Cre-ate: 'cờ-rây' → kẻ vạch tạo ra hình mới

examples: The final decision rests with the manager.
items.memoryTip: De-ci-sion: 'đi xi' (đi rồi) → đã quyết định đi rồi!
De-liver: 'đi li-vơ' → đi giao hàng delivery

examples: There is high demand for this product.
items.memoryTip: De-mand: 'đi mần' (đi làm) → yêu cầu đi làm ngay
De-pend: 'đi phen' này → phụ thuộc vào phen này

examples: She described the suspect to the police.
items.memoryTip: De-scribe: 'đi xờ-crai' → viết ra (scribe) để mô tả

examples: We need to develop new skills.
items.memoryTip: De-velop: 'đi vẹo' rồi sẽ phát triển thẳng lại
Dis-cover: bỏ 'cover' (vỏ bọc) ra → khám phá bên trong

examples: We need to improve the economy.
items.memoryTip: E-cono-my: 'economy class' vé máy bay giá rẻ → liên quan kinh tế
Edu-cation: 'edục' → giáo dục (gần giống nhau!)
En-viron-ment: 'in vòng' → trong vòng xung quanh = môi trường

examples: We need to establish clear rules.
She established herself as an expert.
items.memoryTip: Es-tab-lish: 'ét' + 'stable' (ổn định) → lập nên thứ ổn định

examples: She has ten years of experience.
items.memoryTip: Ex-peri-ence: 'ích' + 'experience' → kinh nghiệm rất 'ích' lợi

examples: Can you explain this to me?
items.memoryTip: Ex-plain: nói 'plain' (rõ ràng) ra → giải thích rõ

examples: I want to improve my English.
items.memoryTip: Im-prove: 'im' + prove (chứng minh) → chứng minh mình tốt hơn → cải thiện
In-clude: 'in' (trong) + close (đóng) → đóng vào trong → bao gồm
In-crease: 'in' (vào) + crease (nếp gấp) → thêm nếp gấp → tăng thêm

examples: Parents have a big influence on children.
items.memoryTip: In-flu-ence: 'in' dấu vân tay → để lại ảnh hưởng

examples: She introduced me to her parents.
The company introduced a new product.
items.memoryTip: Intro-duce: 'intro' (mở đầu) + dẫn vào → giới thiệu

examples: You should invest in your education.
The company invested millions in research.
items.memoryTip: In-vest: 'in' + vest (áo vest) → mặc vest đi đầu tư

examples: She has a lot of knowledge about history.
I gained useful knowledge from the course.
items.memoryTip: Know-ledge: 'know' (biết) + ledge (bờ) → đứng trên bờ hiểu biết

examples: We need to maintain high standards.
items.memoryTip: Main-tain: 'main' (chính) + tain (giữ) → giữ cái chính → duy trì
